summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of QGenie 2.0 new features: Notification Bell, My Jobs page, Admin Manage Modules, Module toggle, TestGen Coverage Gap removal, Dark mode. All 7 major features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Mark all read button is missing data-testid attribute. Has testid=None. All other notification items have testid='notification-item-notif-job-X'. Recommend adding data-testid='mark-all-read'.

issues: Stat cards don't have data-testid attributes for automated testing, uses class-based selectors only

action_items: LOW: Add data-testid='mark-all-read' to the Mark All Read button in notification dropdown
LOW: Add data-testid='stat-card' attributes to My Jobs page stat cards
critical_code_review_comments: Timestamps in demo data show '1y ago' (data is ~1 year old from Jan 2025). Consider updating DEMO_RECENT_JOBS seed data dates to be more recent for demo purposes.
Mark all read button in NotificationBell is missing data-testid for testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new features verified working: (1) Notification bell shows badge count 5, opens Radix dropdown with 5 items showing module/status/job-id/triggered-by/'1y ago' timestamps. (2) My Jobs page at /projects/proj-1/jobs loads with stat cards (2 Complete, 1 Failed, 1 Running, 1 Queued) and table with correct columns. (3) Clicking job row navigates to corresponding module. (4) Admin Modules dialog has 5 toggles with correct data-testids. (5) Toggle off hides module from sidebar nav. (6) TestGen has no Coverage Gap section. (7) Dark mode adds 'dark' class to html element. Minor: 'mark-all-read' button has no data-testid. All dialogs centered correctly.
tests_passed: Notification bell found with data-testid='notification-bell', shows count badge '5'
Notification dropdown opens with 5 items showing module, status (COMPLETE/RUNNING/FAILED/QUEUED), job ID, triggered-by, '1y ago' timestamps
Mark all read button visible in dropdown (no data-testid but functional)
Sidebar shows My Jobs link below Regression Optimizer with Briefcase icon
My Jobs page loads at /projects/proj-1/jobs URL
My Jobs stat cards: 2 Complete, 1 Failed, 1 Running, 1 Queued
Jobs table has headers: Job ID, Module, Status, Triggered By, Executed
Clicking job row navigates to corresponding module (Regression job -> /projects/proj-1/regression)
Admin panel Projects tab shows Modules button (data-testid='manage-modules-proj-1') beside Manage Access
Manage Modules dialog opens centered with 5 toggles: tosca, test-gen, rca, impact, regression
All 5 toggles have data-testid='module-toggle-{name}' and start in 'checked' state
Toggling Tosca off (unchecked) and saving hides Tosca Conversion from sidebar nav
TestGen module has NO Coverage Gap section
Dark mode toggle adds 'dark' class to html element
